device.name: Charging Station (GaN, AC outlets + USB)
device.category: USB + AC charging station / power strip

nameplate_ratings.note: 2 AC outlets rated 1250 W total pass-through; USB ports 100 W total

in_use_w.note: plus whatever AC devices draw, up to 1250 W pass-through

notes: Very efficient GaN charger with negligible idle draw. Total load depends entirely on what is plugged in (up to 100 W USB + up to 1250 W through the AC outlets).
